sources.blockDetail: Schema has no releaseDate field. No PIT-safe release date metadata exists. createdAt is ingestion timestamp only. year/quarter identifies period but not public availability datetime.
sources.recommendedNextStep: Add releaseDate, releaseDateSource, releaseDateConfidence columns via authorized schema migration. Authorization required: 'YES apply FinancialReport releaseDate migration to dev DB'

sources.companionFieldGapNote: releaseDateSource and releaseDateConfidence companion fields absent, but source and trustLevel columns cover equivalent roles. publishedAt is RECORDED not INFERRED — confidence is inherently stronger than MonthlyRevenue's LOW policy.
sources.recommendedNextStep: Proceed to P34: NewsEvent source-present dry-run sample output. Use publishedAt as PIT gate field. paperOnly=true, dryRun=true, entersAlphaScore=false.

comparison.summary: FinancialReport is BLOCKED due to missing PIT metadata fields. NewsEvent is ELIGIBLE with 100% publishedAt/source/trustLevel coverage. Source-present dry-run gate is achievable for NewsEvent only at this time.

NewsEvent_P33.comparativeNote: RECORDED > INFERRED (MonthlyRevenue LOW). NewsEvent has stronger PIT confidence.
